embeds.title: 🦇 LEGO® Batman: Legacy of the Dark Knight
embeds.description:
Cracked install + gold-set unlocks and a performance fix.
**[📥 FitGirl Repack Download](https://fitgirl-repacks.site/lego-batman-legacy-of-the-dark-knight/)**

fields.name: 🎮 Unlock Gold Set + Performance Fix
fields.value:
1. Move spiritovod's `.pak`, `.ucas`, `.utoc` files into `...\LEGOBatmanLotDK\Content\Paks\~mods\`
2. Clear server cache — `Win+R` → `%localappdata%\Dinner\Saved\PersistentDownloadDir\WBASDK\Save\` → **delete** `f09e73ec2b99e39e30b4252f497ef32b`
3. Launch from `...\Binaries\Win64\LEGOBatmanLotDK-Win64-Shipping.exe` — **not** the main shortcut.
4. In-game: **Main Menu → Redeem Code** (codes below).

fields.name: 🔑 Redeem Codes
fields.value:
`00000001` — The Batman (Gold) Batmobile
`00000002` — Batman & Robin (Gold) Batmobile
`00000003` — Batman v Superman (Gold) Batmobile
`00000007` — Golden Knight Suit
`00000017` — Golden Red Brick
-# Codes `00000004`–`00000016` unlock Twitch drops / props.

fields.name: ⚙️ Optional — Engine.ini Optimization
fields.value:
**VRR vs No-VRR:** if G-Sync/FreeSync is enabled in *both* your GPU control panel and monitor, use **VRR** — otherwise use **No-VRR**.

1. Run the game once, then close it.
2. `Win+R` → `%localappdata%\Dinner\Saved\Config\Windows`
3. Overwrite **Engine.ini** with your chosen version (attached).
4. Right-click `Engine.ini` → **Properties** → check **Read-Only** → Apply.

fields.name: ⚠️ Notes
fields.value:
- Keep mod files in `~mods` or your save data may corrupt.
- **Don't combine with other optimization mods.**
- To uninstall: delete the modded `Engine.ini`.

footer.text: LEGO Batman: Legacy of the Dark Knight Guide
